**输入：** n = 5, edges = [[0,1,4],[1,2,3],[1,3,2],[3,4,6]], k = 2

**输出：** 4

def solve(n, edges, k)
  if k >= n
    return 0
  end

  edges.sort! { |a, b| a[2] <=> b[2] }

  parent = Array.new(n) { |i| i }

  def find(x, parent)
    unless parent[x] == x
      parent[x] = find(parent[x], parent)
    end
    parent[x]
  end

  def union(x, y, parent)
    fx = find(x, parent)
    fy = find(y, parent)
    if fx != fy
      parent[fx] = fy
      return true
    else
      return false
    end
  end

  components = n
  result = 0

  edges.each do |u, v, w|
    if components <= k
      break
    end
    if union(u, v, parent)
      components -= 1
    end
    result = w
  end

  result
end
```

```ruby
def solve(n, edges, k)
  if k >= n
    return 0
  end

  edges.sort! { |a, b| a[2] <=> b[2] }

  parent = Array.new(n) { |i| i }

  def find(x, parent)
    unless parent[x] == x
      parent[x] = find(parent[x], parent)
    end
    parent[x]
  end

  def union(x, y, parent)
    fx = find(x, parent)
    fy = find(y, parent)
    if fx != fy
      parent[fx] = fy
      return true
    else
      return false
    end
  end

  components = n
  result = 0

  edges.each do |u, v, w|
    if components <= k
      break
    end
    if union(u, v, parent)
      components -= 1
    end
    result = w
  end

  result
end
```

class DSU
  attr_accessor :parent, :rank

  def initialize(n)
    @parent = (0...n).to_a
    @rank = Array.new(n, 1)
  end

  def find(x)
    unless @parent[x] == x
      @parent[x] = find(@parent[x])
    end
    @parent[x]
  end

  def union(x, y)
    x_root = find(x)
    y_root = find(y)
    return if x_root == y_root

    if @rank[x_root] < @rank[y_root]
      @parent[x_root] = y_root
    else
      @parent[y_root] = x_root
      @rank[x_root] += @rank[y_root]
    end
  end

  def count_components
    roots = Set.new
    (0...n).each do |i|
      roots.add(find(i))
    end
    roots.size
  end

  def n
    @parent.length
  end
end

end
